mapper.update: UPDATE TBL_INBOUND_PRODUCT SET INBOUND_STATUS = 'COMPLETED', ACTUAL_QUANTITY = #{actualQuantity}, ACTUAL_DATE = #{actualDate}, REMARKS = #{remarks}, COMPLETE_TIME = GETDATE(), COMPLETE_USER = #{completeUser}, UPDT_TIME = GETDATE(), UPDT_USER = #{completeUser} WHERE TBL_INBOUND_PRODUCT_ID = #{tblInboundProductId} AND INBOUND_STATUS = 'PENDING'

UPDATE TBL_MTRL_M SET YONGIN_CURRENT_QUANTITY = ISNULL(YONGIN_CURRENT_QUANTITY, 0) + #{actualQuantity}, CURRENT_QUANTITY = ISNULL(CURRENT_QUANTITY, 0) + #{actualQuantity}, UPDT_TIME = GETDATE(), UPDT_USER = #{completeUser} WHERE CMPY_CD = #{cmpyCd} AND AGNT_CD = #{agntCd} AND MTRL_CD = #{mtrlCd} AND MTO_YN = 'N'
-- 재고 변동 이력 기록 INSERT INTO TBL_INV_ADJUSTMENT (CMPY_CD, AGNT_CD, AGNT_NM, TBL_MTRL_M_ID, MTRL_CD, MTRL_NM, ADJUSTMENT_TYPE, BEFORE_QTY, ADJUSTMENT_QTY, AFTER_QTY, ADJUSTMENT_REASON, ADJUSTMENT_DATE, SAVE_TIME, SAVE_USER, UPDT_TIME, UPDT_USER, DELETED_YN) SELECT #{cmpyCd}, #{agntCd}, (SELECT AGNT_NM FROM TBL_AGENCY_M WHERE AGNT_CD = #{agntCd} AND CMPY_CD = #{cmpyCd}), TBL_MTRL_M_ID, #{mtrlCd}, #{mtrlNm}, 'INBOUND', ISNULL(CURRENT_QUANTITY, 0) - #{actualQuantity}, #{actualQuantity}, ISNULL(CURRENT_QUANTITY, 0), '입고완료-자동증가', #{actualDate}, GETDATE(), #{completeUser}, GETDATE(), #{completeUser}, 'N' FROM TBL_MTRL_M WHERE CMPY_CD = #{cmpyCd} AND AGNT_CD = #{agntCd} AND MTRL_CD = #{mtrlCd} AND MTO_YN = 'N'

update.foreach:
UPDATE TBL_MTRL_M SET YONGIN_CURRENT_QUANTITY = ISNULL(YONGIN_CURRENT_QUANTITY, 0) + #{item.actualQuantity}, CURRENT_QUANTITY = ISNULL(CURRENT_QUANTITY, 0) + #{item.actualQuantity}, UPDT_TIME = GETDATE(), UPDT_USER = #{item.completeUser} WHERE CMPY_CD = #{item.cmpyCd} AND AGNT_CD = #{item.agntCd} AND MTRL_CD = #{item.mtrlCd} AND MTO_YN = 'N'
-- 재고 변동 이력 기록 INSERT INTO TBL_INV_ADJUSTMENT ( CMPY_CD, AGNT_CD, AGNT_NM, TBL_MTRL_M_ID, MTRL_CD, MTRL_NM, ADJUSTMENT_TYPE, BEFORE_QTY, ADJUSTMENT_QTY, AFTER_QTY, ADJUSTMENT_REASON, ADJUSTMENT_DATE, SAVE_TIME, SAVE_USER, UPDT_TIME, UPDT_USER, DELETED_YN ) SELECT #{item.cmpyCd}, #{item.agntCd}, (SELECT AGNT_NM FROM TBL_AGENCY_M WHERE AGNT_CD = #{item.agntCd} AND CMPY_CD = #{item.cmpyCd}), TBL_MTRL_M_ID, #{item.mtrlCd}, #{item.mtrlNm}, 'INBOUND', ISNULL(CURRENT_QUANTITY, 0) - #{item.actualQuantity}, #{item.actualQuantity}, ISNULL(CURRENT_QUANTITY, 0), '입고완료-자동증가', #{item.actualDate}, GETDATE(), #{item.completeUser}, GETDATE(), #{item.completeUser}, 'N' FROM TBL_MTRL_M WHERE CMPY_CD = #{item.cmpyCd} AND AGNT_CD = #{item.agntCd} AND MTRL_CD = #{item.mtrlCd} AND MTO_YN = 'N'

UPDATE TBL_MTRL_M SET YONGIN_CURRENT_QUANTITY = ISNULL(YONGIN_CURRENT_QUANTITY, 0) - #{item.actualQuantity}, CURRENT_QUANTITY = ISNULL(CURRENT_QUANTITY, 0) - #{item.actualQuantity}, UPDT_TIME = GETDATE(), UPDT_USER = #{item.revertUser} WHERE CMPY_CD = #{item.cmpyCd} AND AGNT_CD = #{item.agntCd} AND MTRL_CD = #{item.mtrlCd} AND MTO_YN = 'N'
-- 재고 변동 이력 기록 INSERT INTO TBL_INV_ADJUSTMENT ( CMPY_CD, AGNT_CD, AGNT_NM, TBL_MTRL_M_ID, MTRL_CD, MTRL_NM, ADJUSTMENT_TYPE, BEFORE_QTY, ADJUSTMENT_QTY, AFTER_QTY, ADJUSTMENT_REASON, ADJUSTMENT_DATE, SAVE_TIME, SAVE_USER, UPDT_TIME, UPDT_USER, DELETED_YN ) SELECT #{item.cmpyCd}, #{item.agntCd}, (SELECT AGNT_NM FROM TBL_AGENCY_M WHERE AGNT_CD = #{item.agntCd} AND CMPY_CD = #{item.cmpyCd}), TBL_MTRL_M_ID, #{item.mtrlCd}, #{item.mtrlNm}, 'REVERT', ISNULL(CURRENT_QUANTITY, 0) + #{item.actualQuantity}, -#{item.actualQuantity}, ISNULL(CURRENT_QUANTITY, 0), '입고취소-자동차감', CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), GETDATE(), 120), GETDATE(), #{item.revertUser}, GETDATE(), #{item.revertUser}, 'N' FROM TBL_MTRL_M WHERE CMPY_CD = #{item.cmpyCd} AND AGNT_CD = #{item.agntCd} AND MTRL_CD = #{item.mtrlCd} AND MTO_YN = 'N'
